sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(1) — Alambique Creek (San Mateo Co.)
sources.quotedText: (1) Alambique Creek (San Mateo Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 218044, "Alambique Creek", Stream, San Mateo Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":218044,"gaz_name":"Alambique Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Mateo"}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13608073.6137, 4495212.1551) converts to lon -122.243405, lat 37.401448, matching this stream's source coordinate near Wunderlich County Park also cited by Wikipedia's {{cite gnis|218044}} (37°24'06"N 122°14'38"W); ~432m from the file's recorded coordinate (-122.2477, 37.4033) — within tolerance, coordinate confirmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30; closed the rest of the year
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero trout may be retained during the open season; all trout caught must be released unharmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — catch and release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
